import.title: Ntshuam
import.subtitle: Nqa tej yaam num uas twb muaj lawm ntawm disk mus rau hauv lub tsev qiv ntawv.

step1.title: Nrhiav qhov folder
step1.description: taw tes rau hauv paus nplaub tshev nrog koj tej yaam num thiab lem.
step1.ffmpeg_warning: FFmpeg tsis pom - cov ntaub ntawv uas xav tau hloov dua siab tshiab yuav raug hla.

step2.title: Tshuaj xyuas cov khoom
step2.description: Xyuas cov npe, xwm txheej, thiab dab tsi yuav raug xa tawm ua ntej lees paub.

step3.title: Ntshuam
step3.description: Paub meej tias luam cov ntaub ntawv thiab tsim cov haujlwm.
step3.copy_originals: Luam cov ntaub ntawv qub rau hauv lub tsev qiv ntawv
step3.done_description: Cov haujlwm hauv qab no tau tsim hauv koj lub tsev qiv ntawv.

templates.title: Cov qauv
templates.subtitle: Reusable prompt templates thiab meta-tags rau Suno.
templates.delete_confirm_description: Qhov no tsis tuaj yeem thim rov qab.

editor.template_hint: Kos qhov twg txhua qhov sib txawv nrog nws lub npe qhwv hauv ob chav curly braces - piv txwv li, qhov sib txawv hu ua "ib hom ntawv" ua ib hom ntawv qhwv hauv ob qhov qhib thiab ob txoj hlua kaw.

metatags.title: Meta-tags
metatags.subtitle: Cov qauv thiab cov cim npe Suno lees paub hauv cov nkauj.

tier_legend.1: Kauj Ruam 1 - cov ntaub ntawv thiab sib xws
tier_legend.4: Qib 4 - cov placebo, tsis muaj pov thawj

metatags.empty: Tsis muaj kev cai meta-tags tseem.

settings.title: Chaw
settings.subtitle: Cov ntaub ntawv kaw lus, hom lus, thiab kev nyiam ua ntej.
settings.gpu_none: Tsis pom cov chaw muab kev pabcuam GPU
settings.lufs_target_hint: Siv raws li qhov pib tawm tswv yim thaum exporting yuav siv sij hawm. Suno lub neej ntawd nyob ib ncig ntawm -14 LUFS.
settings.saved: Cov kev nyiam tau txais kev cawmdim

guide.title: Suno cov ntaub ntawv qhia
guide.subtitle: Yuav ua li cas ntes lub suab thiab guitar yuav siv sij hawm uas tau txais txiaj ntsig zoo tshaj plaws.
guide.intro: Suno ua tau zoo tshaj plaws nrog cov ntaub ntawv huv, tsis paub meej. Phau ntawv qhia no suav nrog kev npaj, theem phiaj, thiab sau ntawv sau 3-5 feeb.

prep.title: Kev npaj
prep.body: Sau rau hauv ib chav kho mob lossis ib qho uas muaj cov khoom muag muag ntau (cov ntaub, ntaub pua plag, khaub ncaws hauv lub txee dai khaub ncaws). Tua cov kiv cua thiab txhua yam uas hums. Ua kom sov koj lub suab rau 5 feeb ua ntej kaw.

levels.title: Qib: -12 txog -6 dBFS
levels.body: Taw rau qhov siab tshaj ntawm -12 thiab -6 dBFS ntawm lub ntsuas. Hauv qab qhov ntau, lub suab nrov tom qab yuav pom ntau dua; saum toj no, clipping kev pheej hmoo nce. Siv qhov ntsuas ntawm nplooj ntawv Cov Ntaub Ntawv los teeb tsa koj qhov nce ua ntej koj pib.

distance.title: Mic nrug: 15-30 cm
distance.body: Nyob ntawm 15 mus rau 30 cm ntawm lub microphone. Kaw tshaj qhov exaggerates plosives thiab sib thooj nyhuv; deb deb khaws ntau chav reverb thiab suab nrov.

script.title: Sau ntawv
script.vowels: Sustained vowels — a, e, i, o, u
script.scales: Yooj yim teev, nce thiab nqis
script.excerpt: Ib zaj nkauj excerpt (8 mus rau 16 bars)
script.spoken_phrase: Ib kab lus hais, yog li Suno tuaj yeem nyeem koj lub suab nrov

expectations.title: Suno xav li cas
expectations.body: WAV, 48 kHz, mono, qhuav (tsis muaj reverb lossis teebmeem), 3 mus rau 5 feeb ntawm kev siv. Qhov huv tshaj plaws, feem ntau tus neeg sawv cev 2 feeb ntawm kev noj feem ntau ua rau cov txiaj ntsig zoo tshaj plaws.

suno_voice_full.name: Full vocal script for Suno
suno_voice_full.desc: 5 feeb qhia: sov-up, vowels, scales, ob zaj nkauj excerpts, dynamic, thiab ib kab lus hais.

step.warmup_inst: Loosen nrog yawns, di ncauj trills (brrr), thiab ib tug mos hum li ib feeb. Tsis tas yuav sau - nws tsuas yog so koj lub caj pas ua ntej hu nkauj.
step.vowels_inst: Tuav txhua lub suab - a, e, i, o, u - rau 3 mus rau 4 vib nas this ntawm koj lub suab zoo, nrog lub ntim ruaj khov. Qhov no pab Suno khaws cov ntoo ntshiab ntawm koj lub suab.
step.scales_inst: Hu nkauj ib qho yooj yim nplai nce thiab nqis, ntawm "la" lossis "na". Nws tsis tas yuav ua kom zoo meej - lub hom phiaj yog los qhia koj lub suab nrov.
step.section_inst: Hu 8 mus rau 16 kab ntawm zaj nkauj, nrog lub hom phiaj tiag tiag uas koj xav qhia. Ua ntej qhov pom tseeb thiab muaj nyob ntawm kev ua kom zoo tshaj plaws.
step.section2_inst: Hu nkauj 8 mus rau 16 bars - qhov zoo tshaj plaws yog ib qho kev hu nkauj lossis ib ntu uas sib piv nrog rau yav dhau los. Ntau ntau pab tus qauv kawm koj lub suab.
step.dynamics_inst: Hu nkauj tib kab lus pib maj mam thiab xaus nrov, tsis straining koj caj pas. Qhov no qhia Suno koj lub suab dynamic ntau yam.
step.spoken_inst: Hais - tsis txhob hu nkauj - ib kab lus luv luv, zoo li koj tab tom tham. Qhov no yuav pab Suno paub qhov tseeb timbre ntawm koj lub suab.

errors.unknown: Ib yam dab tsi mus tsis ncaj ncees lawm.
errors.network: Tsis tuaj yeem ncav cuag lub server.
errors.validation_error: Tshawb xyuas cov ntaub ntawv koj tau nkag mus.
errors.device_busy: Lub cuab yeej siv los ntawm lwm qhov kev pab cuam.
errors.device_not_found: Tsis pom lub suab ntaus ntawv.
errors.already_recording: Ib qho kev kaw cia tau ua tiav.
errors.ffmpeg_missing: FFmpeg tsis tau nruab - nruab nws los hloov cov ntaub ntawv no.
errors.permission_denied: Tso cai tsis pom zoo rau txoj kev muab.
errors.job_cancelled: Cov txheej txheem raug muab tso tseg.
errors.export_failed: Ua tsis tiav rau export cov ntaub ntawv.
